hero_desc: end-to-end solutions in transportation. Track your cargo in real time from the moment you ship it until delivery.
about_desc: With years of experience and a strong partner network, we continue to be your reliable logistics partner in international and domestic freight transportation. Whether by sea, air or road, we offer fast, safe and budget-friendly solutions.
about_p1: "M-Trans" LLC was established in 2011 in the city of Khachmaz, Republic of Azerbaijan, and is part of the "M-Forward" group of companies. Our company is engaged in the transportation of both domestic and international cargo. Based on our many years of experience, you can be sure that we can regularly meet your freight transportation needs by road, sea or air. The production years of our trucks range from 2003 to 2014.
about_p2: With more than 80 trucks of our own and our logistics center meeting modern standards, we are at your service.
about_li_euro: Considering that they comply with Euro 5 and Euro 6 standards, we easily ensure efficient and prompt delivery of cargo.
about_page_p2: We own more than 80 container carriers and more than 150 reefer and freight vehicles complying with Euro 5 and Euro 6 standards. Through long-term and close cooperation with internationally recognized major maritime shipping companies such as Maersk, MSC, ARKAS and others, M-Trans LLC has earned its brand name as the most reliable and cost-effective company in the region in the field of logistics, regardless of the volume or distance of transportation.
about_video_fallback: Your browser does not support the video format.
about_mission_desc: To be a logistics company that fulfills the wishes of the firms it works with at the highest level, values customer satisfaction as a hardworking team, and holds innovation and brand value in high regard.
about_vision_desc: To be a prestigious company that creates differences in logistics and constantly grows, gives direction to the future of the logistics sector with its current experience, and is the most chosen on a global scale by all its customers.
about_adv_li1: Choosing the optimal delivery route for shipments
about_adv_li2: The ability to track the location of cargo via a GPS sensor
about_adv_li4: Door-to-door delivery using various modes of transport
about_adv_li5: Providing advice on the customs clearance of cargo
about_adv_li8: Long-term work experience of the partners we work with
about_str_li1: Maintaining containers at a set temperature regime with a GenSet unit
about_str_li2: Online monitoring and control of temperature in trailers
about_str_li3: Transportation of fruits, vegetables and food products in special containers
about_str_li4: Considering the number of trucks owned by the company and the fact that the vehicles comply with the latest Euro 5 and Euro 6 standards, we easily ensure efficient and prompt delivery of cargo.
cert_ohs: Occupational Health and Safety Management System
why_c1_desc: We deliver your cargo to the right address on time and according to schedule.
why_c2_desc: The safety of your goods during transportation is fully guaranteed.
why_c3_desc: We provide the most optimal and affordable logistics costs for your business.
why_c4_desc: Our team is always at your service for your questions and inquiries.
srv_desc: Comprehensive transportation, logistics and repair services tailored to our customers' needs.
srv_sea_desc: Reliable and cost-effective delivery of containers and large cargo by sea transport.
srv_sea_page_desc: The most economical and reliable solution for intercontinental transportation of large and heavy cargo. Direct and transit lines to the world's main ports.
srv_air_desc: The fastest air solutions to anywhere in the world for your urgent cargo.
srv_air_page_desc: The fastest and most reliable delivery option for your urgent and valuable cargo. With our global airport network, your cargo arrives on time.
srv_road_desc: Door-to-door service through international and domestic road freight transportation.
srv_road_page_desc: Door-to-door delivery with reliable truck and TIR services across Europe and Asia. Your cargo is under control at all times via the GPS tracking system.
srv_rail_desc: Cost-effective and safe rail transportation for heavy industry and large-volume cargo.
srv_rail_page_desc: An economical and safe overland alternative for large-volume industrial cargo. Stable and on-time delivery over long distances.
srv_rep_desc: Professional repair and prompt technical inspection of trucks and vehicles.
srv_parts_desc: Supply of original and quality spare parts for all types of vehicles.
srv_content_sea_desc: With FCL and LCL container solutions, our economical and safe international sea transportation service ensures your cargo is delivered over long distances at the most favorable prices...
srv_content_air_desc: The fastest and most reliable delivery option for your urgent and valuable cargo. With our global airport network, your cargo arrives on time...
srv_content_road_desc: Door-to-door delivery with reliable truck and TIR services across Europe and Asia. Your cargo is under control at all times via the GPS tracking system...
srv_content_rail_desc: Safe and ecologically clean train transportation for your large-volume cargo. For long distances, it is both a fast and economical choice...
repair_hero_desc: Professional service with modern equipment for heavy machinery, TIR and large trucks. From computer diagnostics to overhaul — all in one center.
repair_c1_desc: Electronic analysis of the engine and systems and accurate detection of faults.
repair_c2_desc: Current and overhaul repair work of engines, restoration and renewal of parts.
repair_c3_desc: Diagnostics, adjustment and complete repair of the gearbox and transmission systems.
repair_c4_desc: Inspection and renewal of the brake system and steering control parts.
repair_c5_desc: Repair of wiring, sensors, lighting and central control units.
repair_c6_desc: Flushing radiators, charging air conditioners and changing oil.
repair_proc1_desc: Accurate identification and inspection of the problem.
repair_proc3_desc: Professional execution in accordance with standards.
repair_urgent_title: Does your vehicle need urgent service?
repair_urgent_desc: Stuck on the road? Our 24/7 mobile service team is just a call away.
repair_step1_desc: Initial inspection and registration of the vehicle.
repair_step2_desc: Identifying the problem through computer and physical inspection.
repair_step3_desc: Professional execution in accordance with standards.
partners_subtitle: M-Trans Logistic organizes multimodal transportation through a strong, reliable global network. Our partners are the world's leading shipping lines and industrial manufacturers.
partners_maersk_desc: Our main strategic partner in global maritime container transportation.
partners_maersk_li1: One of the world's largest container operators.
partners_maersk_li2: An extensive port and logistics network in more than 130 countries.
partners_maersk_li3: Digital API integration and instant cargo tracking with M-Trans.
partners_msc_desc: A global shipping line with an extensive logistics network across the world's oceans.
partners_msc_li1: Comprehensive multimodal and maritime transportation structure.
partners_msc_li2: Access to direct and transit lines between all continents.
partners_msc_li3: Cargo transportation safety and optimal transit times.
partners_msc_li4: Special project cargo and reefer container solutions.
partners_wabco_desc: Technical partnership in the safety and control systems of commercial vehicles.
partners_wabco_li1: Supply of EBS, ABS and electronic control systems.
partners_wabco_li2: Improving the technical safety standards of the M-Trans fleet.
partners_wabco_li3: Integration of Smart Trailer management technologies.
partners_socar_desc: Strategic partnership in the logistics chain of regional industrial and polymer products.
partners_socar_li1: Large-scale chemical and industrial raw material transportation.
partners_socar_li2: Logistics support with block trains and trucks to the CIS and European destinations.
partners_socar_li3: Integrated warehousing and supply chain solutions.
partners_knorr_desc: Official technical service partner for brake systems and commercial vehicles.
partners_knorr_li1: Supply of brake and pneumatic systems in accordance with global standards.
partners_knorr_li2: Guarantee of uninterrupted and safe movement of fleet vehicles.
partners_knorr_li3: Special automation training and diagnostic support for technical staff.
partners_hengst_desc: Our official filter partner for filtration systems and industrial engine components.
partners_hengst_li1: High-quality filtration products for heavy-tonnage trucks.
partners_hengst_li2: Support for fuel efficiency and ecological emission control systems.
partners_hengst_li3: Ensuring engine durability of M-Trans trucks on long-distance routes.

form_desc: Fill out the form to cooperate with us — our team will contact you within 1 business hour.
